source_pr.title: planner: fix prepared plan cache checker for CTE names
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #66351

Problem Summary:
Prepared statements containing CTEs are incorrectly marked as uncacheable by the prepared plan cache checker with warning:
`skip prepared plan-cache: find table <db>.cte failed`.
The checker treats CTE names as physical tables and looks them up in InfoSchema.

### What changed and how does it work?
- Track CTE visibility scope in `cacheableChecker` while traversing AST nodes.
- Skip physical table lookup in `checkTableCacheable` path when a `TableName` is a visible CTE reference.
- Add regression test for issue #66351 to verify:
  - no warning at `PREPARE`
  - second `EXECUTE` hits prepared plan cache (`@@last_plan_from_cache = 1`).

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Fix prepared plan cache checker to correctly handle CTE table names.
```

symptoms: Prepared statements containing CTEs were incorrectly marked as uncacheable by the prepared plan cache checker, emitting a warning and preventing cache hits.
failure_signature: skip prepared plan-cache: find table <db>.cte failed (CTE name treated as physical table)
root_cause_explanation: The prepared plan-cacheability checker could mistakenly treat CTE names as physical tables during AST traversal, causing inconsistent cacheability decisions and test failures. The PR tracks visible CTE names and skips InfoSchema table checks for them, making the plan-cache checker behavior deterministic and adding regression coverage.
fix_pattern: Teach the plan cacheability checker to treat visible CTE names as non-physical tables (skip InfoSchema lookup) and add regression coverage to ensure PREPARE emits no warning and EXECUTE can hit the prepared plan cache.

evidence: evidence: prepared plan cache checker treats CTE names as physical tables, causing warning and skipping cache

analysis:
PR title: planner: fix prepared plan cache checker for CTE names
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/66374
Triage summary: Fix prepared plan cache checker to handle CTE names (avoid false "find table <db>.cte failed" and allow cache hits)
Changed files (5): docs/note/planner/plan_cache_notes.md, pkg/planner/core/casetest/plancache/BUILD.bazel, pkg/planner/core/casetest/plancache/plan_cacheable_checker_test.go, pkg/planner/core/plan_cacheable_checker.go, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/explainfor.result
Full patch analyzed; see patch_url.
